params.SpellDescription: Add an amount of {C} equal to the number of time counters on CARDNAME.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add an amount of {C} equal to the number of time counters on CARDNAME.

params.SpellDescription: Time travel. Activate only as a sorcery. (For each suspended card you own and each permanent you control with a time counter on it, you may add or remove a time counter.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Time travel. Activate only as a sorcery. (For each suspended card you own and each permanent you control with a time counter on it, you may add or remove a time counter.)

params.Description: CARDNAME enters tapped with a time counter on it.
